name: forwarded-chain-iifl-maruti
notes: Email forwarded twice through the desk before landing in vimana@. Forwarder list non-empty; sender remains the original broker domain.

envelope.subject: FW: FW: MARUTI — Flash: pricing pressure intensifies; PT ₹11,000
envelope.bodyText:
----- Forwarded by analyst@vimanacapital.com -----

----- Forwarded by desk@vimanacapital.com -----

MARUTI — Flash note. We maintain Hold on MARUTI with revised PT ₹11,000 (from ₹11,500). Q1 retail share lost ~120 bps to Hyundai/Toyota in compact-SUV.
